body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This PR makes 2 unrelated, small fixes:
- enable rendering of stable docs - right now https://clima.github.io/ClimaCoupler.jl/stable/ does not exist
- update the tests to use the new SurfaceFluxes interface, which was done for src in #1567. This should fix the failing downgrade test on main
title: fix stable docs rendering, downgrade tests
